description: Labeled questions over the productfruits.com SOC2 Type 2 sample report. 7 factual, 3 out-of-scope (refusal expected).

questions.question: Which cloud provider does the entity use to host the service?
What encryption algorithm is used to protect data at rest?
What protocol is used to encrypt data in transit?
Does the entity have a documented incident response program?
Are background checks performed on employees?
Is multi-factor authentication required for system access?
What region is the primary data center located in?
What is the entity's annual revenue in 2024?
What programming languages are used to build the platform?
What is the CEO's personal phone number?
